title: import_ngsadmix_q_v1 — manifest contract for K-templated NGSadmix Q-matrix capture
description: Validates POST /api/actions when type='import_ngsadmix_q'. Wraps GET /api/population/ngsadmix/q/{K} (population_endpoint.py) and emits one staging_ngsadmix_q_v0 layer per call. K must be in the sweep range [2, 12] (matches NGSADMIX_K_MIN/MAX in population_endpoint.py).
